questionHtml:
A block of mass 2.0 kg accelerates uniformly at a rate of 1.0 m s−2 when a force of 4.0 N acts on it.
The force is doubled while resistive forces stay the same. What is the block’s acceleration?


A.  4.0 m s−2

B.  3.0 m s−2

C.  2.0 m s−2

D.  1.0 m s−2
